name: Lakeside Golf & Games
about: Lakeside Golf & Games offers a golf and entertainment venue featuring TruGolf simulators and arcade-style games. The facility is located north of Pizza House at 19 N. Main Street, Cicero, providing access to national and local courses year-round. Visitors can book hourly sessions for up to 4 golfers or 8 players for arcade games, with options for memberships including an Eagle Member plan and a Junior Golf Package. The venue also hosts events like birthday parties, team building activities, and corporate gatherings, operating 24/7 through online booking. With a focus on both serious practice and family fun, the venue provides immediate swing feedback and shot metrics to help improve golf skills.
why_golfers_like_it: TruGolf simulator with Apogee launcher provides immediate and meaningful feedback
Real-time camera replay of swings for detailed analysis
Bag mapping feature helps identify distance gaps and track shot consistency
Shot metrics like ball speed, spin rate, and mash rate for performance review

food_and_drink.notes: Pizza can be ordered from Pizza House via provided link
No mention of alcohol service on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator system with Apogee launcher for detailed swing feedback

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Food can be ordered from Pizza House via the provided link. There's no mention of alcohol service, so outside drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time for 18 holes, but hourly bookings are available for up to 4 golfers or 8 players for arcade games.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, offering a Junior Golf Package and arcade games, plus it hosts birthday parties and other family events.
